name: dota-recorder
description: Dota 2 Recorder - personal desktop app that auto-records matches, tags moments, and browses VODs.

scripts.dev:electron: npm --prefix app run build:electron && cross-env NODE_ENV=development DOTAREC_DEV=1 electron app
scripts.build:all: npm run build:core && npm run build:app && npm run build:electron
scripts.dist: npm run fetch:obs && npm run fetch:ffmpeg && npm run build:all && electron-builder --win nsis --x64
